11cafe/jaaz ·GitHub ⭐ 5973 TypeScript · Generative AI, Canva Alternative, AI Agents, Stable Diffusion, Content Creation, Open Source, Multimodal

What it is

Jaaz.app is an infinite canvas platform where AI agents help users create visual content. Users can 'build' ideas like playing with LEGO—sketching, pointing with arrows, and chatting with an agent to instantly generate images, videos, and storyboards. It focuses on privacy (local-first) and can use both cloud APIs (GPT-4o, Kling) and local models (ComfyUI, Ollama).

Problems solved

  • Creative blocks: Generates full images/videos from single prompts or simple sketches.
  • Complex tool sets: Replaces intricate UI controls with natural language interaction and a 'magic canvas'.
  • Character inconsistency: Feature built-in logic to maintain the same character across different generated scenes.
  • Privacy concerns: Offers an offline version where project data never leaves the user's device.

How to get started

Download the desktop app for Windows or macOS. For developers, clone the repo and run the React frontend and Python backend. Users can then start a project, draw on the canvas, and use the 'AI Agent' sidebar to generate or modify content dynamically.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

11cafe/jaaz is positioned as a jaaz.app is an infinite canvas platform where ai agents help users create visual content. users can 'build' ideas like playing with lego—sketching, pointing with arrows, and chatting with an agent to instantly generate images, videos, and storyboards. it focuses on privacy (local-first) and can use both cloud apis (gpt-4o, kling) and local models (comfyui, ollama). It aims to provide developers with a robust, TypeScript-based solution for the world's first open-source multimodal creative assistant this is a substitute for canva and manus that prioritizes privacy and is usable locally.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Creative blocks: Generates full images/videos from single prompts or simple sketches.. 11cafe/jaaz addresses this by jaaz.app is an infinite canvas platform where ai agents help users create visual content. users can 'build' ideas like playing with lego—sketching, pointing with arrows, and chatting with an agent to instantly generate images, videos, and storyboards. it focuses on privacy (local-first) and can use both cloud apis (gpt-4o, kling) and local models (comfyui, ollama), offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using TypeScript, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

4. Core Implementation

Main logic revolves around the world's first open-source multimodal creative assistant this is a substitute for canva and manus that prioritizes privacy and is usable locally. The implementation utilizes TypeScript's strengths to provide jaaz.app is an infinite canvas platform where ai agents help users create visual content. users can 'build' ideas like playing with lego—sketching, pointing with arrows, and chatting with an agent to instantly generate images, videos, and storyboards. it focuses on privacy (local-first) and can use both cloud apis (gpt-4o, kling) and local models (comfyui, ollama), ensuring high reliability and performance under load.

5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, download the desktop app for windows or macos. for developers, clone the repo and run the react frontend and python backend. users can then start a project, draw on the canvas, and use the 'ai agent' sidebar to generate or modify content dynamically. This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.

7. Summary

An essential, TypeScript-powered utility that streamlines the world's first open-source multimodal creative assistant this is a substitute for canva and manus that prioritizes privacy and is usable locally; it effectively tackles Creative blocks: Generates full images/videos from single prompts or simple sketches. while maintaining a high standard of code quality and usability.
